narrative:
Germantown-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,078 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points.
